title: digitaria abludens
intro: Digitaria abludens, also known as Finger Millet or Ragi, is a type of cereal crop that belongs to the grass family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Digitaria abludens include reducing the risk of heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as improving digestion and reducing symptoms of menopause. Digitaria abludens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, flour, and supplements, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
